hero.desc: Seven years across statutory audit, reconciliation, bookkeeping, and taxation — in Nepal and India. Currently Finance Solutions Officer at Nepal Works. CA Final Group I cleared, January 2026.

trust.text: ICAI — CPT & IPCC Groups I & II Passed
CA Final Group I Passed · Jan 2026

about.heading: A finance professional who gets the details right

paragraphs.text: I am Sures Guragai, a finance and audit professional based in Kathmandu. My CA journey began in 2016 as an Articled Audit Assistant in India, and over the past seven years I have built hands-on experience across statutory audit, internal audit, bookkeeping, VAT & TDS compliance, and financial reconciliation.

I currently serve as Finance Solutions Officer at Nepal Works, where I manage commission calculations, ledger monitoring, data accuracy controls, and day-to-day reconciliation workflows. Prior to this I spent over two years at Trust Haven Professional in Kathmandu performing statutory audits for clients across engineering, nonprofit, restaurant, securities, and service sectors.

My early training across firms in New Delhi and Noida gave me strong foundations in bank audits, NPA review, income tax compliance, and company incorporation matters. Alongside professional work I am concurrently pursuing an MBS and LLB to deepen my understanding of business and legal frameworks.
I bring a disciplined, detail-oriented approach to every engagement — whether ensuring a ledger reconciles to the last rupee or structuring clean financial records for an audit.
